title: Regular expressions should not be too complicated
description: Complex regular expressions can be hard to understand, making them prone to errors and security issues. Simplify them whenever possible.

noncompliant.code:
import re
text = 'abc123xyz_ABC123XYZ'
match = re.search(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_]', text)
noncompliant.description: Uses a complex regular expression with special characters and character classes.

compliant.code:
import re
text = 'abc123xyz_ABC123XYZ'
match = re.search(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9]', text)
compliant.description: Simplified regular expression with fewer character classes and special characters.

why_is_this_an_issue: Complex regular expressions can be hard to understand, making them prone to errors and security issues.

metadata.title: Regular expressions should not be too complicated
